problems.text: A bakery sold 45 muffins in the morning and 32 in the afternoon. How many muffins were sold in total?
A train travels at 60 km/h for 2.5 hours. How far does it travel in kilometers?
If 8 programmers can complete a project in 15 days, how many days would it take 12 programmers?
A store offers 20% off a $85 item. What is the sale price in dollars?
Three servers handle requests. Server A handles 40%, Server B handles 35%, and Server C handles the rest. If 2000 requests came in, how many did Server C handle?
A sprint has 10 story points. The team completes 3 stories worth 2, 3, and 4 points. How many points remain?
A function runs in O(n^2) time. If n=10 takes 5ms, approximately how long would n=20 take in ms?
A binary search on a sorted array of 1024 elements requires at most how many comparisons?
A company has 120 employees. 75% are developers, and 20% of developers are senior. How many senior developers are there?
A CI/CD pipeline has 4 stages. Each stage has a 95% success rate (independent). What is the probability that the entire pipeline succeeds? Give as a percentage rounded to the nearest integer.
Alice has twice as many tasks as Bob. Carol has 5 more tasks than Alice. If Bob has 8 tasks, how many tasks does Carol have?
A database query takes 200ms. Adding an index reduces query time by 75%. What is the new query time in ms?
A team velocity averages 30 story points per sprint. They have 180 points of work remaining. How many sprints are needed?
Three APIs return results in 120ms, 80ms, and 200ms. If called in parallel, what is the total response time in ms?
A cache has a 90% hit rate. Of 500 requests, how many result in a cache miss?
A linked list has 7 nodes. How many pointers need to be updated to reverse it completely?
A meeting room seats 12 people. 3 teams of 4 want to meet. How many separate meeting sessions are needed if only one team can meet at a time?
If a recursive function makes 2 calls per invocation and the base case is at depth 5, how many total function calls are made (including the initial call)?
An API rate limit allows 100 requests per minute. A batch job needs to make 450 requests. What is the minimum time in minutes needed?
A hash table has 16 buckets and 12 entries. Assuming uniform distribution, what is the load factor?
